title: CMI hosts U.S. Secretary of Energy, Members of Congress
description: CMI researchers from Ames National Laboratory conducted the activity for this highlight
text:
CMI researchers from Ames National Laboratory conducted the activity for this highlight
Achievement
The Critical Materials Innovation Hub at Ames National Laboratory provided tours and information for the U.S. Secretary of Energy Chris Wright, Iowa Senator Joni Ernst and U.S. Representatives from Iowa, Ohio, and Arkansas.
Significance & Impact
Secretary Wright’s visit included discussions with researchers for rare earth elements and critical materials
CMI research is creating technologies, captivating industry and catalyzing deployment to ensure a domestic supply chain for key products, including permanent magnets
